texto: My dance teacher will show me pictures of girls who are rhythmic gymnasts, and they are super skinny. But I don't want to be too skinny. I think that looks a little gross when you are dancing. You don't want to be a scrawny, bony thing.
explicacao: Citação de Maddie Ziegler sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “My dance teacher will show me pictures of girls who are rhythmic gymnasts, and they are super ski…” articula reflexao, dance, me em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como academia e me.

frase_original: My dance teacher will show me pictures of girls who are rhythmic gymnasts, and they are super skinny. But I don't want to be too skinny. I think that looks a little gross when you are dancing. You don't want to be a scrawny, bony thing.

texto: I love dancing just because I've done it my whole life and it's definitely what I want to do. I feel like, I want to train with acting and do movies. Those two are my main priorities. I definitely want to be able to sing and model, too. I definitely love those, too.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Maddie Ziegler: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “I love dancing just because I've done it my whole life and it's definitely what I want to do. I f…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que vida, love, acting pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de dia-chuvoso e vida.

frase_original: I love dancing just because I've done it my whole life and it's definitely what I want to do. I feel like, I want to train with acting and do movies. Those two are my main priorities. I definitely want to be able to sing and model, too. I definitely love those, too.
